calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shaun Carberry for Phyllis Abad.

With regard to the issue of failure to inventory, Mr. Carberry stated that this was a pour over will and that he never expected it to go into probate, that they had to sell the house and remove all of the personal property, that the personal property was divided amongst the three Beneficiaries and that the Beneficiaries signed receipts. The Court granted the Petition for Final Distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Y. Watts. (Not Reported)
